test: TT-Cross bond dimensions vs Megethos control

megethos_zeroed.method: feature 0 set to 0 in both domains

verdict: TT-Cross bonds SURVIVE Megethos removal. Rank unchanged (4->4). Validated rank 2 without Megethos. The tensor coupling function captures non-Megethos structure that phoneme NN matching cannot detect.

reconciliation.TT_Cross: ALIVE — rank 4 survives Megethos zeroing AND shuffling
reconciliation.explanation: TT-Cross uses a coupling FUNCTION (cosine similarity in projected space), not nearest-neighbor matching. The function captures distributional coupling that NN collapses. The tensor structure is real. The transfer metric was broken.
